title: Dirt Kickstart
description: A quick way to quickstart your tree-less world.
body:
This idea came to me when playing single biome worlds, and discovered that a lot of them lack any trees. Which, are kinda important for starting a Minecraft world.

That is where this mod comes in, adding a crate craftable from 4 dirt blocks of any kind to give you some light stuff to start your journey.

The crate drops:
- Saplings
- Apples
- Logs
- And the 4 dirt given back you used to craft it.

But, keep in mind this is intended for **starting a world,** there's nothing for easily getting stone, iron, or other ores.

Most biomes have dirt in them, so you can use this in almost every single biome world.
